retinol.description: Vitamin A derivative used for visible signs of aging and acne.
retinol.whatIsIt: A retinoid that supports skin cell turnover.

retinal.description: A potent vitamin A derivative, one conversion step from retinoic acid.
retinal.whatIsIt: A next-generation retinoid used in nighttime treatments.

glycolic acid.description: A water-soluble exfoliating acid with a small molecular size.
glycolic acid.whatIsIt: An alpha hydroxy acid commonly derived from sugar cane.

lactic acid.description: A gentle alpha hydroxy acid that exfoliates and attracts moisture.

salicylic acid.description: An oil-soluble exfoliant that works within pores.
salicylic acid.whatIsIt: A beta hydroxy acid used for congestion and breakouts.

benzoyl peroxide.whatIsIt: An active ingredient that helps reduce acne-causing bacteria.

ascorbic acid.description: The pure, active form of vitamin C.

vitamin c.description: An antioxidant ingredient used to support radiance.
vitamin c.whatIsIt: A family of antioxidant ingredients including ascorbic acid and its derivatives.

niacinamide.description: A versatile form of vitamin B3.

hyaluronic acid.description: A moisture-binding humectant naturally found in skin.
hyaluronic acid.whatIsIt: A sugar molecule that attracts water.
whatDoesItDo: Plumps the look of fine dehydration lines.
avoidFor: Very dry climates without an occlusive

glycerin.description: A dependable humectant that draws water into the upper skin layers.
glycerin.whatIsIt: A moisture-binding ingredient found in cleansers and creams.

ceramides.description: Skin-identical lipids that support the moisture barrier.
ceramides.whatIsIt: A family of fats naturally present in the outer skin layer.

squalane.description: A lightweight emollient that softens and seals in moisture.

zinc oxide.description: A mineral UV filter used in sunscreen.
zinc oxide.whatIsIt: An inorganic filter that helps protect against UVA and UVB rays.

octocrylene.description: An organic UV filter that also helps stabilize formulas.
octocrylene.whatIsIt: A sunscreen filter primarily covering UVB and short UVA wavelengths.
